DP.493.0000:
Mom: [0103,0000]!\f
[0103,0001] came calling for you
a little while ago.\f
I don’t know what it was about, but
he said it was an emergency.\f
DP.493.0001:
Mom: You know how impatient
[0103,0000] is.\f
He took off before I could even
ask what it was about.
DP.493.0002:
Mom: Bye-bye, [0103,0000]!
You take care now!
DP.493.0003:
Mom: But that [0103,0000]...
He always invites you along.
DP.493.0004:
Mom: Oh, yes!
[0103,0000]!\f
Don’t go into the tall grass.
Wild Pokémon might attack you.\f
It would be OK if you had your own
Pokémon, but you don’t, so...
DP.493.0005:
Mom: What is it, dear?
Isn’t [0103,0000] waiting for you?
DP.493.0006:
Mom: What’s up, dear?\f
...\f
Wow.
I can’t believe that happened to you.\f
Am I ever glad that both you and
[0103,0000] are unharmed.\f
The professor you mentioned is
most likely Professor Rowan of\r
Sandgem Town.\f
I’ve heard that he is well known for
his studies on Pokémon.\f
I hear he’s also quite intimidating...\f
[0103,0001], I think you need to
visit him in Sandgem Town.\f
You need to properly explain why you
had no choice but to use his Pokémon.\f
Don’t worry!
I’m sure he will understand.\f
DP.493.0007:
Oh, I know!
[0103,0000], put these on.\f
DP.493.0009:
Going to Sandgem Town is like an
adventure in itself, right?\f
With those Running Shoes, you can
get to faraway places much faster.\f
OK...
Let me read the instructions...\f
“Press the B Button and dash
about faster than ever before!\f
“Put on the Running Shoes and
blaze new trails of adventure!”\f
Well, isn’t that just nifty!
DP.493.0010:
Mom: I’ll read you the instructions
for the Running Shoes...\f
“Press the B Button and dash
about faster than ever before!\f
“Put on the Running Shoes and
blaze new trails of adventure!”\f
Well, isn’t that just nifty!
DP.493.0011:
Mom: Welcome home, [0103,0000].
Are you and your Pokémon healthy?\f
It’s still early in the morning.
Take a quick rest, dear.\f
DP.493.0012:
Mom: Welcome home, [0103,0000].
Are you and your Pokémon healthy?\r
Take a quick rest, dear.\f
DP.493.0013:
Mom: Welcome home, [0103,0000].
Are you and your Pokémon healthy?\f
I just made dinner.
Take a quick rest, dear.\f
DP.493.0014:
Mom: Welcome home, [0103,0000].
Are you and your Pokémon healthy?\f
It’s so late right now...
Take a quick rest, dear.\f
DP.493.0015:
Mom: What’s up, [0103,0000]?\f
...\f
Wow. Professor Rowan asked you
to do something that big.\f
OK, dear, go for it!
Your mom’s got your back!\f
Oh, I know! [0103,0000], I’ve got
something that you’ll find useful.\f
DP.493.0016:
That’s a Journal. It keeps a record
of your daily events.\f
Check it, and you’ll be able to
remember what you did last.\f
DP.493.0017:
Gee, a journey full of adventure...
I envy you, kiddo.\f
Plus, you’re not alone.
You have your Pokémon with you.\r
I wish I could go instead!\f
DP.493.0018:
I’m just joking, dear!
Yup, [0103,0000]!\f
I’ll be all right by myself, so you
go and enjoy your adventure!\f
When you’re exposed to new things,
and experience new sensations...\r
It makes your mother happy too.\f
...But come back sometimes.\f
I would like to see the kinds of
Pokémon you’ve caught, dear.\f
DP.493.0019:
[0103,0001]’s mom: Excuse me.
Is my little [0103,0001] here?\f
DP.493.0021:
[0103,0001]’s mom: Oh...
Then, he must have left already...\r
What to do...\f
That boy shouted about going on an
adventure, then he bolted.\f
He’s so headstrong and reckless...
I at least wanted him to take this...\f
DP.493.0022:
Mom: Not to worry, [0103,0000] will
deliver that to him.\f
DP.493.0024:
[0103,0001]’s mom: Oh, really?
You’d do that for me?\f
[0103,0000], please take this to
[0103,0001] for me.\f
DP.493.0025:
[0103,0001]’s mom: Oh, really?
You’d do that for me?\f
[0103,0000], please take this to
[0103,0001] for me.\f
DP.493.0026:
[0103,0001]’s mom: Let me think...\f
Knowing my boy, he would probably
head straight to Jubilife City...\f
OK, please take that to my
[0103,0001].\f
DP.493.0029:
MC: Here we are!
It’s the Contest Digest!\f
The winner of today’s Normal Rank
Cute Contest is...\f
Brooke, who entered a breathtakingly
cute Pokémon!\f
That’s all the time we have today!
Until next time!
DP.493.0030:
MC: Here we are!
It’s the Contest Digest!\f
The winner of today’s Normal Rank
Smart Contest is...\f
Westley, who won with his bright spark
of a Pokémon!\f
That’s all the time we have today!
Let’s meet again!
DP.493.0031:
MC: Here we are!
It’s the Contest Digest!\f
The winner of today’s Normal Rank
Tough Contest is...\f
Dominic, who overwhelmed with his
awesomely buffed Pokémon!\f
That’s all the time we have today!
Let’s meet again!
DP.493.0032:
Mom’s favorite dessert is in
the refrigerator.
DP.493.0033:
Mom’s kitchen is spotless!
You can see your face on the floor!
DP.493.0034:
This is where Mom does all her
delicious cooking.
DP.493.0035:
Mom: [0103,0000]!\f
[0103,0001] came looking for you
a little while ago.\f
I don’t know what it was about, but
he was shouting about you needing\r
to get on a ship at Snowpoint City.\f
You know how impatient he is.
He was gone before I could ask.
DP.493.0036:
Mom: [0103,0000]!\f
[0103,0001] came looking for you
a little while ago.\f
I don’t know what it was about, but
he was shouting about you needing\r
to get on a ship at Snowpoint City.\f
You know how impatient he is.
He was gone before I could ask.\f
Anyway, how’s it going, kid?\f
Is your project with Professor Rowan
coming along?
